mapper.select: select id, apply_name, apply_account, dept_name, dept_code, handler_name, handler_code, office_name, office_code, office_handler_name, office_handler_code, meal_date, meal_location, attend_num, intern_name, meal_reason, file_ids, flow_type, apply_date, apply_no, node, node_state, flow_status, status, start_time, end_time from tb_meal_ticket where id = #{id}
mapper.insert: insert into tb_meal_ticket(apply_name, apply_account, dept_name, dept_code, handler_name, handler_code, office_name, office_code, office_handler_name, office_handler_code, meal_date, meal_location, attend_num, intern_name, meal_reason, file_ids, flow_type, apply_date, apply_no, node, node_state, flow_status, status, start_time, end_time) values (#{applyName}, #{applyAccount}, #{deptName}, #{deptCode}, #{handlerName}, #{handlerCode}, #{officeName}, #{officeCode}, #{officeHandlerName}, #{officeHandlerCode}, #{mealDate}, #{mealLocation}, #{attendNum}, #{internName}, #{mealReason}, #{fileIds}, #{flowType}, #{applyDate}, #{applyNo}, #{node}, #{nodeState}, #{flowStatus}, #{status}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})

insert into tb_meal_ticket(apply_name, apply_account, dept_name, dept_code, handler_name, handler_code, office_name, office_code, office_handler_name, office_handler_code, meal_date, meal_location, attend_num, intern_name, meal_reason, file_ids, flow_type, apply_date, apply_no, node, node_state, flow_status, status, start_time, end_time) values
(#{entity.applyName}, #{entity.applyAccount}, #{entity.deptName}, #{entity.deptCode}, #{entity.handlerName}, #{entity.handlerCode}, #{entity.officeName}, #{entity.officeCode}, #{entity.officeHandlerName}, #{entity.officeHandlerCode}, #{entity.mealDate}, #{entity.mealLocation}, #{entity.attendNum}, #{entity.internName}, #{entity.mealReason}, #{entity.fileIds}, #{entity.flowType}, #{entity.applyDate}, #{entity.applyNo}, #{entity.node}, #{entity.nodeState}, #{entity.flowStatus}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.startTime}, #{entity.endTime})

insert into tb_meal_ticket(apply_name, apply_account, dept_name, dept_code, handler_name, handler_code, office_name, office_code, office_handler_name, office_handler_code, meal_date, meal_location, attend_num, intern_name, meal_reason, file_ids, flow_type, apply_date, apply_no, node, node_state, flow_status, status, start_time, end_time) values
(#{entity.applyName}, #{entity.applyAccount}, #{entity.deptName}, #{entity.deptCode}, #{entity.handlerName}, #{entity.handlerCode}, #{entity.officeName}, #{entity.officeCode}, #{entity.officeHandlerName}, #{entity.officeHandlerCode}, #{entity.mealDate}, #{entity.mealLocation}, #{entity.attendNum}, #{entity.internName}, #{entity.mealReason}, #{entity.fileIds}, #{entity.flowType}, #{entity.applyDate}, #{entity.applyNo}, #{entity.node}, #{entity.nodeState}, #{entity.flowStatus}, #{entity.status}, #{entity.startTime}, #{entity.endTime})
on duplicate key update apply_name = values(apply_name), apply_account = values(apply_account), dept_name = values(dept_name), dept_code = values(dept_code), handler_name = values(handler_name), handler_code = values(handler_code), office_name = values(office_name), office_code = values(office_code), office_handler_name = values(office_handler_name), office_handler_code = values(office_handler_code), meal_date = values(meal_date), meal_location = values(meal_location), attend_num = values(attend_num), intern_name = values(intern_name), meal_reason = values(meal_reason), file_ids = values(file_ids), flow_type = values(flow_type), apply_date = values(apply_date), apply_no = values(apply_no), node = values(node), node_state = values(node_state), flow_status = values(flow_status), status = values(status), start_time = values(start_time), end_time = values(end_time)
mapper.update:
update tb_meal_ticket
apply_name = #{applyName},
apply_account = #{applyAccount},
dept_name = #{deptName},
dept_code = #{deptCode},
handler_name = #{handlerName},
handler_code = #{handlerCode},
office_name = #{officeName},
office_code = #{officeCode},
office_handler_name = #{officeHandlerName},
office_handler_code = #{officeHandlerCode},
meal_date = #{mealDate},
meal_location = #{mealLocation},
attend_num = #{attendNum},
intern_name = #{internName},
meal_reason = #{mealReason},
file_ids = #{fileIds},
flow_type = #{flowType},
apply_date = #{applyDate},
apply_no = #{applyNo},
node = #{node},
node_state = #{nodeState},
flow_status = #{flowStatus},
status = #{status},
start_time = #{startTime},
end_time = #{endTime},
where id = #{id}
